data.title: Sei Network Chosen as Candidate Blockchain for WYST Stablecoin
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Sei Network has been selected by the Wyoming Stablecoin Commission as a candidate blockchain for WYST, a U.S. stablecoin backed by fiat currency. The stablecoin will utilize LayerZero's cross-chain bridging technology.

data.title: JuChain Ecosystem's first metaverse city, Fomo City, attracted more than 10,000 on-chain users within 5 hours of its launch
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Fomo City, the first native metaverse co-governance city of JuChain ecosystem, has officially started the first city construction phase at 13:14:19 today. It has attracted more than 10,000+ on-chain users to participate in the first phase of the city co-construction in just 5 hours.
Fomo City is a key metaverse ecological project jointly promoted by JuChain and JuCoin, dedicated to creating a new on-chain digital civilization sample co-built, co-governed and shared by the community. Users can obtain identity credentials, construction permissions, long-term benefits and governance rights by holding FMC tokens.

data.title: Global equities bounce back as dollar strengthens and gold sinks sharply
data.description:
Global equities rose across the board on Friday, with traders brushing off Middle East conflict fears and repositioning out of safe-haven assets like gold. The dollar surged. Bond yields nudged higher. Stocks in Europe and Asia gained, even while US futures slipped. Crude oil fell. And central banks made aggressive moves that caught investors off […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/global-equities-dollar-and-gold/

data.title: Global Uncertainty Puts Cryptos in a Tight Spot
data.description:
Amid global rate pivots and economic ambiguity, crypto investors find little clarity. Central bank confusion — not conflict — is driving the real risk-off tone.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/06/20/global-uncertainty-puts-cryptos-in-a-tight-spot/

data.title: Tesla Secures $557M Energy Storage Deal with Shanghai as Energy Division Grows
data.description:
Neither the author, Tim Fries, nor this website, The Tokenist, provide financial advice. Please consult our website policy prior to making financial decisions. Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) has reportedly inked a massive $557 million energy storage station deal with Shanghai authorities, marking the electric vehicle giant’s first grid-scale battery storage project in China. The agreement, signed Friday between Tesla, China Kangfu International Leasing Co, and the Shanghai government, involves a 4 billion yuan investment and will utilize Tesla’s Megapack batteries for large-scale energy infrastructure
source: https://tokenist.com/tesla-secures-557m-energy-storage-deal-with-shanghai-as-energy-division-grows/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=tesla-secures-557m-energy-storage-deal-with-shanghai-as-energy-division-grows

data.title: Federal Reserve May Consider Rate Cut in July Meeting
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller indicated that a rate cut might be possible as early as the July meeting. This statement suggests a potential shift in monetary policy, reflecting ongoing assessments of economic conditions. The possibility of a rate cut highlights the Fed's responsiveness to economic indicators and its commitment to maintaining stability.

data.title: Parataxis Buys Bridge Biotherapeutics to Launch Bitcoin Treasury in Korea
data.description:
Parataxis Holdings secures controlling stake in Bridge Biotherapeutics to create South Korea’s first institutional Bitcoin treasury company.
source: https://coincu.com/344498-parataxis-buys-bridge-biotherapeutics-to-launch

data.title: Bitwise CEO says Bitcoin’s true rival is US Treasuries, not gold
data.description:
Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley believes the actual competition for Bitcoin isn’t gold, but government-backed bonds like US Treasuries and UK gilts. In a June 20 post on X, Horsley argued that gold and Bitcoin are apolitical stores of value that operate outside direct government control.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitwise-ceo-says-bitcoins-true-rivals-are-us-treasuries-not-gold/

data.title: Binance Enhances Token Transparency with New Features
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, introducing Binance's latest features aimed at enhancing token transparency and empowering users with better decision-making tools. The article highlights the introduction of Locked Addresses and Concentration Indicator features, which are designed to provide users with clearer insights into token distribution and potential volatility risks. These additions are part of Binance's ongoing commitment to set industry standards for token transparency and user empowerment.

Binance's new Locked Addresses feature offers users a direct view into the circulating supply dynamics of various crypto projects. Many projects opt to lock a portion of their tokens for strategic purposes, such as incentivizing long-term commitment from team members, investors, or the community. These tokens are held in locked addresses and remain inaccessible until a predetermined vesting period concludes. The Locked Addresses feature allows users to verify the status of these locked tokens, track the quantity involved, and incorporate this information into their trading decisions. This visibility is crucial for understanding price dynamics, as it helps users distinguish between circulating tokens and those that are inaccessible, thereby preventing misinterpretations of market cap or liquidity.

The Concentration Indicator is another innovative tool introduced by Binance, providing users with a snapshot of token ownership distribution. This feature uses a weighted average formula to capture concentration both within and outside the Binance platform, resulting in a score ranging from 0 to 100. A higher score indicates greater concentration, suggesting that a small number of holders may have significant influence over the token's price, while a lower score implies broader distribution and potentially lower volatility risk. Users can utilize this score as one of several factors in their investment decisions, offering a clearer understanding of the market landscape they are navigating.

These features are part of Binance's broader commitment to transparency, which has been ongoing since 2024. Binance has steadily introduced tools that provide users with deeper insights without requiring them to leave the platform. Previous updates include the integration of token unlock and vesting schedules, a token methodology update, and the linking of financial reports to token information pages. Binance co-founder Yi He emphasized the importance of transparency, stating that users have expressed a desire for more tools to understand the tokens they are trading. Binance aims to set new standards in market transparency, not only informing users but also educating and empowering them to make better decisions. As the crypto market evolves, Binance continues to lead the way in providing transparent tokenomics, fostering trust, and encouraging healthy market behavior.

data.title: UpTop: Users who did not successfully participate in TGE will also receive airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: UpTop officials said in X Space that users who did not successfully participate in TGE will also receive airdrops, and said that real retail investors in this TGE got most of the chips. Please refer to the official website for specific information.

data.title: Crypto kidnapping in France: Man loses Ledger wallet and €5,000 to captors
data.description:
A young man has become the latest victim of a wave of crypto-related kidnappings in France that have continued despite multiple arrests and measures to improve security. The abduction near Paris, which resulted in the loss of a cryptocurrency hardware wallet and a sum of fiat money, was followed by a kidnapping attempt in Normandy, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/man-loses-wallet-crypto-kidnapping-france/

data.title: Aster launches hidden order feature to improve on-chain transaction privacy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Aster has launched a hidden order function, allowing users to trade at a limited price without exposing order information. This function is available on Aster Pro. Orders will not appear in the public order book before execution, avoiding slippage and front-running risks while retaining matching priority. Aster said that this move is intended to provide stronger privacy protection for high-frequency, high-leverage transactions and enhance the decentralized perpetual contract trading experience.

data.title: France Faces Another Cryptocurrency-Related Kidnapping Incident
data.description: According to Odaily, a 23-year-old man in France was recently kidnapped, with the abductors demanding 5,000 euros in cash and a Ledger wallet from his partner. The victim was released after the demands were met. This marks the tenth cryptocurrency-related kidnapping in France this year. French police have launched an investigation into the case, treating it as an organized gang kidnapping and illegal detention. No further details about the kidnapped individual have been disclosed at this time.

data.title: Norwegian listed company Standard Supply invested approximately $4.97 million in Bitcoin for the first time
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Norwegian listed company Standard Supply AS (OSE: STSU) announced that the company will be renamed StandardCoin and has completed its first Bitcoin investment of 50 million Norwegian kroner (about 4.97 million US dollars), officially entering the field of digital assets. The investment is managed by a top regulated custodian and aims to promote financial innovation. CEO Eldar Paulsrud said that this investment has been carefully planned and focuses on security and risk management. In the future, the company will promote the development of the digital asset ecosystem as a responsible market participant. The company may further disclose strategic adjustments and investment plans in the future.

data.title: ZetaChain Enhances Cross-Chain Transactions with Lightning Network Upgrade
data.description:
According to PANews, ZetaChain has successfully completed a lightning network upgrade, laying the groundwork for decentralized cross-chain transactions. The upgrade includes several technical improvements, such as a 70% increase in block production speed, reducing block confirmation time from 6 seconds to 4 seconds with a future goal of 2 seconds. Additionally, the upgrade enhances Universal Apps compatibility by adding support for Solana smart contracts on the mainnet and the TON chain on the testnet. 

The upgrade also optimizes CCTX speed and performance with features like signature caching and gas enhancements, ensuring faster and more stable transactions. ZetaChain remains committed to decentralization, avoiding centralized sequencers or custodial bridges, and is developing layers like Speedrun within its ecosystem. This upgrade is just the beginning, with plans to support mainnets like Sui and TON and introduce new features to improve Universal App development and user experience. 

While the reduced block time approaches a near-real-time experience, true real-time cross-chain execution remains challenging due to the finality speeds of different chains. However, ZetaChain continues to explore advanced functionalities to enhance CCTX performance.

data.title: South Korean stock Bridge Biotherapeutics rose more than 20% today
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Yahoo Finance market shows that the stock price of Bridge Biotherapeutics, Inc., a listed biotechnology company in South Korea, rose 20.59% today, and its market value rose to 49.218 billion won, or about 36 million US dollars. 
Earlier news, Bitcoin investment company Parataxis Holdings LLC announced that it had reached a final investment agreement of 25 billion won with Bridge Biotherapeutics, Inc., which enabled it to obtain the latter's controlling stake. After the transaction is completed, Bridge Biotherapeutics will be renamed Parataxis Korea and continue to be listed on KOSDAQ, the Korean GEM market.

data.title: Jupiter suspends DAO voting until the end of 2025 as current governance structure falls short of expectations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Solana Ecosystem DEX project Jupiter announced that it would suspend DAO voting until the end of 2025, saying that the current governance structure did not meet expectations and the trust mechanism failed. Executive member Kash Dhanda said that the team will return in 2026 with a "more unified" governance model. The current staking incentive of 50 million JUP per quarter remains unchanged, but no new working groups funded by the DAO will be added. JUP has fallen by 21.8% in the past 30 days. After the news was announced, the price of the currency remained stable at $0.405. (CoinDesk)
